title: Implement URL Shortener REST API in main.go

steps.description: Implement URLShortener domain entity and port interface
steps.done_condition: Domain entity and port interface implemented with unit tests passing

steps.description: Implement in-memory storage adapter for URLShortener port
steps.done_condition: Adapter implements URLShortener interface with unit tests passing

steps.description: Implement composition root to wire adapters and ports
steps.done_condition: Composition root successfully initializes application with all dependencies wired

steps.description: Implement HTTP handlers for URLShortener use cases
steps.done_condition: HTTP handlers implement all required REST endpoints with unit tests passing

steps.description: Implement integration tests for full URL shortener flow
steps.done_condition: All integration tests pass with successful short URL creation and redirection

riskRegister.mitigation: Document state limitations and consider future persistence extension
Use hex framework's built-in router and dependency injection

successCriteria: Single binary executable runs with URL shortener API
All REST endpoints implement required functionality
In-memory storage handles all test cases successfully
